title: Kivens max chunk client
description: this pack is a QOL client pack ment that uses nvidium and slyder to allow a playable render distance over 100 chunks
body: The purpose of this QOL client pack is to improve your gaming experience through the use of Nvidium and Slyder. By installing this pack, you can enjoy a playable render distance of more than 100 chunks. However, it's essential to keep in mind that this mod is solely compatible with an NVIDIA GPU that is 1630 or more advanced and supports mesh shaders. If the necessary OpenGL extensions are not recognized, the nvidium mod will deactivate automatically, resulting in a loss of performance benefits.
